description: A Marketing Manager needs to justify the budget for regional ad campaigns by analyzing whether ads drive immediate sales or have a one-month delay. Create a view named 'CAMPAIGN_ROI_ANALYSIS' in the HR schema that analyzes the statistical relationship between ad spend and sales revenue using daily data from HR.RAW_AD_SPEND and HR.RAW_SALES (2024-2025). The view must aggregate data into monthly totals per region and calculate the Correlation (CORR) and Slope (REGR_SLOPE) for two scenarios: Lag 0 (same month) and Lag 1 (spend affects next month's sales). The view should return one row per REGION_ID (1-5) with the following columns: REGION_ID, TOTAL_SPEND, TOTAL_SALES, CORR_LAG0, SLOPE_LAG0, CORR_LAG1, SLOPE_LAG1, and a BEST_STRATEGY column labeled 'IMMEDIATE' if Lag0 correlation is higher, 'DELAYED' if Lag1 is higher, or 'INEFFECTIVE' if both correlations are below 0.3. Connect via DBeaver or SQLPlus (User: hr, Pass: hr123).
